productDisplayName: John Players Men Formal Lavender Shirt
description: Style note This john players shirt gets a sartorial stamp of approval, with it's refined collar, silhouetted tailoring and it's fine, luxe fabric. Make the right impression at work with this shirt - professional and stylish at the same time! Product Details Striped shirt in lavender and mint, has a spread collar, patch pocket on the chest, a buttoned placket, full sleeves with two button cuffs and a curved hem Material and Care 100% cotton Dry clean or machine wash with like colours only Use a non-chlorine bleach if needed Line dry inside-out in shade Warm iron Size and FitRegular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size 40
